candidate_check.description: PowerShell script block logging must be enabled on Windows 10.

check_content_excerpt:
If the following registry value does not exist or is not configured as specified, this is a finding.

Registry Hive: HKEY_LOCAL_MACHINE 
Registry Path: \SOFTWARE\Policies\Microsoft\Windows\PowerShell\ScriptBlockLogging\

Value Name: EnableScriptBlockLogging

Value Type: REG_DWORD
Value: 1
fix_text_excerpt: Configure the policy value for Computer Configuration >> Administrative Templates >> Windows Components >> Windows PowerShell >> "Turn on PowerShell Script Block Logging" to "Enabled".
title: PowerShell script block logging must be enabled on Windows 10.
